hero.title: Discover Koh Rong and stay at Golden Sun Villa
hero.subtitle: Your trusted guide to beaches, events, and luxury villa stays on Koh Rong island.

aboutIsland: Koh Rong is known for clear waters, white sand beaches, and vibrant nightlife. Use this site to plan transport, discover activities, and stay updated on island events.
aboutVilla: Golden Sun Villa offers a private and comfortable base for families and groups. The villa includes modern amenities, easy beach access, and concierge-style support for your stay.
